changeSet.author: orsik
changeSet.sql: CREATE KEYSPACE IF NOT EXISTS distcomp WITH replication = {'class': 'SimpleStrategy', 'replication_factor': 1};

changeSet.author: orsik
orsik
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS distcomp.tbl_comment_by_tweet ( tweet_id bigint, created timestamp, id bigint, content text, PRIMARY KEY ((tweet_id), created, id) ) WITH CLUSTERING ORDER BY (created DESC, id DESC);
